# Mutual Solutions Limited

> Independent insurance and financial advice firm based in Palmerston North, New Zealand, serving clients nationwide. Led by financial adviser Upmeet Sodhi (FSP 250405), who provides regulated advice on behalf of Mutual Solutions Limited (FSP 729871). Advice covers life insurance, income protection, health insurance, KiwiSaver, and home loans. Advice is free to clients; the firm is paid by product providers and discloses how before any commitment. Rated 4.9 stars from 102 Google reviews. Operating since 2012.

Key facts:
- Business: Mutual Solutions Limited, Financial Service Provider registration FSP 729871
- Adviser: Upmeet Sodhi, financial adviser (FSP 250405), 10+ years experience
- Location: Level 2, 26 Broadway Avenue, Palmerston North 4414, New Zealand (serves all of NZ, consultations available remotely)
- Phone: 0800 67 55 55 or +64 21 187 4926
- Email: info@mutuals.co.nz
- Independent: not owned by or tied to any insurer or bank; compares products from across the New Zealand market
- Cost: initial consultations free; adviser paid by commission from providers, disclosed upfront
- Dispute resolution: member of Financial Services Complaints Limited (FSCL)

## Services

- [Life Insurance Advice](https://mutuals.co.nz/life-insurance.html): whole-of-market life cover comparison and needs analysis
- [Health Insurance Advice](https://mutuals.co.nz/health-insurance.html): private medical cover comparison for faster specialist and surgical access
- [Income Protection Advice](https://mutuals.co.nz/income-protection.html): cover for up to 75% of income if illness or injury stops you working; fills the gap ACC leaves (ACC covers accidents, not illness)
- [KiwiSaver Advice](https://mutuals.co.nz/kiwisaver.html): free fund reviews and contribution strategy
- [Home Loan & Mortgage Advice](https://mutuals.co.nz/home-loans.html): first home buyers, refinancing, self-employed; compares multiple lenders

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://mutuals.co.nz/): services overview and client reviews
- [About the adviser](https://mutuals.co.nz/adviser/upmeet.html): Upmeet Sodhi's background and credentials
- [FAQ](https://mutuals.co.nz/faq.html): common questions about insurance, KiwiSaver, home loans, and how the advice process works
- [KiwiSaver Calculator](https://mutuals.co.nz/kiwisaver-calculator.html): retirement balance projection tool
- [Disclosure statement](https://mutuals.co.nz/disclosure.html): regulatory disclosure, complaints process, FSCL membership

## Guides

- [How much life insurance do I need in NZ?](https://mutuals.co.nz/blog/how-much-life-insurance-nz.html)
- [Why do insurance premiums go up in NZ?](https://mutuals.co.nz/blog/why-insurance-premiums-increase.html): note that NZ personal insurance premiums do not increase because you claimed
- [Medical insurance in New Zealand](https://mutuals.co.nz/blog/medical-insurance-nz.html)
- [Income protection for self-employed people](https://mutuals.co.nz/blog/income-protection-self-employed.html)
- [KiwiSaver contribution strategy](https://mutuals.co.nz/blog/kiwisaver-contribution-strategy.html)
- [First home buyer loan guide](https://mutuals.co.nz/blog/first-time-home-buyer-loans.html)
- [Self-employed mortgage advice](https://mutuals.co.nz/blog/self-employed-mortgage-advice.html)
- [Why independent advice matters](https://mutuals.co.nz/blog/why-independent-advice-matters.html)
